turn_info.content: I wonder what I should do sometimes.  I try to tell friends and family that I cannot always be the problem solver, I try to make them see that I deserve a chance to ask advice, to just vent, or to just have a light talk about the weather or a party or something.  They don’t seem to hear me.  One friend said she thought I was blowing it out of proportion. But that’s the way I feel
